name: No Hold Buttons
description: Switches out a bunch of long-press button prompts with with normal press

options.tooltip: Makes card reader instant press by switching it to the Open Door button

options.tooltip: Switches long-press door interaction to the Open Door button for instant use

options.name: Misc
